framework.name: PayPal's Checkout Disruption
framework.description: PayPal's branded checkout growth collapsed from 6% to 1% as Apple Pay, Shop Pay, Klarna, and other frictionless alternatives captured market share. Despite activist investor pressure and new leadership, execution couldn't overcome structural market shifts.
framework.raw_quote: Growth in branded checkout slowed to 1% in the last quarter, down from 6% a year ago.
